items.hook: 这类维修很多时候不是不会约，而是怕这次问题没说清。
items.bridge: 管道维修里真正决定下一步的，通常是位置、问题类型和时间窗口。
items.next_step: Ask for location, problem type, and preferred time.
items.handoff_suggestion: If clear facts arrive, move to Catcher.

items.hook: 这种情况先把时间和范围锁住，会比先看一堆服务项更省心。
items.bridge: 夜间、交房和返家场景通常还会牵涉报价、拆修和时段，所以先收窄范围更重要。
items.next_step: Ask for date, location, and the main repair priority.
items.handoff_suggestion: Route deadline cases toward Catcher then Dispatcher.

items.hook: 先把最担心的点讲清楚，比急着比价格更有帮助。
items.bridge: 很多乱拆、乱收费和返修问题，只有把位置和主要顾虑说出来，才能回答得更稳。
items.next_step: Ask what the main concern is and what kind of repair this is.
items.handoff_suggestion: Trust-sensitive cases should carry a risk tag.

items.hook: 这种情况先判断来不来得及，比先看一堆价格更关键。
items.bridge: 急修通常要先锁时间、位置和是否愿意先做检测或临时处理。
items.next_step: Ask which time, what location, and whether a narrower urgent scope would work.

items.hook: 返修这件事很多时候不是重新选，而是先把这次要处理哪一类说清。
items.bridge: 复约更看重路线、时间和是否还是之前那种服务。
items.next_step: Ask whether this is a rebooking, the usual route, and the timing.
items.handoff_suggestion: Repeat cases can route to Catcher or Followup.

items.hook: 第一次约维修先把位置和时间说清，反而更容易轻松一点。
items.bridge: 不用一上来就决定怎么修，先把位置、场景和想约时间收窄就够了。
items.next_step: Ask for location, problem type, and preferred service time.
items.handoff_suggestion: Route to Catcher when basics are complete.
